race.comment: INCA TRAIL (6) is a speedy galloper who is long overdue for a win with a long line of placings. Low draw and looks the speed here. Will take catching. LINE 'EM UP LOUI (12) got home hard to score in easier grade last time. Going very well and looks drawn to stalk the pace and get home late. ALABAMA MOONLIGHT (9) has scored back-to-back wins at Townsville. Freshened for this and coming back in trip. Tricky gate but will be winding up late. SIGIRIYA ROCK (2) is a former Victorian returning for a new yard and presents fitter for two trials. Could well be too good on best figures. COLLEANO (10) is down in weight and draw for a good run.
